compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: PrimaKlima EC-Blue Line 4400-4800 m³/h, PrimaKlima Whisperblower EC-TC, PrimaKlima EC-Blue 580-1450 m³/h
compatible_devices.notes: Controls any 0-10V voltage-controlled EC fan via two independent RJ45 channels (intake + exhaust). USB-powered (5V/1A). No Schuko sockets — only EC fans supported. PrimaKlima explicitly listed as accessories.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: GrowControl temp/humidity sensor (included), PresSense negative pressure sensor (optional)
compatible_devices.notes: Temp/humidity sensor with 5 m cable included. PresSense negative pressure sensor optional. GrowControl ecosystem sensors only.
